summary: The AI agent failed to address the patient's request for a dermatology appointment and ended the call prematurely, indicating a significant issue in handling the interaction.

issues.title: Call Termination Without Assistance
issues.details: The agent abruptly ended the call after the patient requested to schedule a dermatology appointment, which is a failure to assist the patient and fulfill the purpose of the call.
issues.expected: The agent should have continued the conversation to schedule the appointment as requested.
